title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom including explosive token consumption, only 18% of tokens spent on shipped products, and potential overinvestment driven by circular financing dynamics. Topics include concerns about tokenmaxxing, Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation, and emerging use cases like AI trading.
